steps.title: Use the y-intercept condition
steps.content:
The y-intercept is at $(0, -323)$, which means $f(0) = -323$.

Substituting $x = 0$ into $f(x) = a^x + b$:
$$a^0 + b = -323$$
Since $a^0 = 1$ for any nonzero base $a$:
$$1 + b = -323$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content:
Subtract 1 from both sides to isolate $b$:
$$b = -323 - 1 = -324$$
